channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
item.description:
📊 Score: 185 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • 🏆S-Authority:sam altman(+100)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting....

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute

📊 Score: 153 | Category: 大V/权威

  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)

📄 Summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model....

item.title: [8] [模型算法] Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
item.description:
📊 Score: 92 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: We present Vista4D, a robust and flexible video reshooting framework that grounds the input video and target cameras in a 4D point cloud. Specifically, given an input video, our method re-synthesizes the scene with the same dynamics from a different camera trajectory and viewpoint. Existing video reshooting methods often struggle with depth estimat...

item.title: [9] [模型算法] When Prompts Override Vision: Prompt-Induced Hallucinations in LVLMs
item.description:
📊 Score: 92 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Despite impressive progress in capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), these systems remain vulnerable to hallucinations, i.e., outputs that are not grounded in the visual input. Prior work has attributed hallucinations in LVLMs to factors such as limitations of the vision backbone or the dominance of the language component, yet the r...
